title: FPS BOOST+
description: A lightweight modpack optimized for Minecraft
body:
# **Summary**

Boost your Minecraft FPS instantly with a curated set of lightweight optimization mods.
Perfect for low-end PCs or players who want smoother gameplay without lowering visual quality.

軽量化に特化した最適化MODをまとめたFPS向上パックです。
低スペックPCでも画質を落とさず、スムーズなプレイを実現します。
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e0b821340ea8296320f619177553e38c1254fc_0.webp)
# **Feature**
- You can **significantly** improve **FPS** while minimizing changes to vanilla gameplay
- Whether it's an **old laptop** or a **high-performance desktop PC**, you can **significantly** boost your **FPS**
- **Multiplayer stability** and **input latency** have been **optimized**

  FPSBOOST+ (Forge) – Description

# **FPSBOOST+ (Forge)** 

Instead of building a **large MOD list**, install a **single large MOD** (such as Create or Mekanism) and add **this MOD pack** on top of it.

This allows you to play **large Forge MODs** with more stable **FPS and smoother performance**, without unnecessary features or heavy additional elements.

# **Feature**

Focused on **performance and stability**

Optimized for **Forge 1.20.1**

Designed to work alongside **large MODs**

**No gameplay changes**, no extra content

Minimal conflicts, **clean setup**

# **Recommended usage**

**Large MOD** (Create / Mekanism / etc.)

If you want to enjoy large Forge mods without turning your game into a lag fest,
this modpack is meant to be your **performance base**.

Tested with Create (standalone). Other large mods may work, but are not officially tested.

# **Quick Start**

- **Download** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
- **Install** the FPS BOOST+ via "Browse" in the app.
- **Play** and enjoy optimized performance!!!
  
**More** info in the [Modrinth Modpack Guide](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth).

# **Downloads**
- [Download Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fps-boost+by-yone/versions)
